body_html:
did harry confirm the numbers

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

fyi. Do you want me to respond?

Please let me know how you wish for me to proceed.

Darren

Subject: Capital Call
Date: Tue, 13 Dec 2005 12:27:25 -0500
From: "Peck, Tom" TPeck@nydailynews.com
To: DKIESQ@aol.com

Radar has not yet received the $375,000 capital
call. As discussed
earlier, Mort's payment was received a few weeks
ago. The company is
essentially out of cash and needs the funds to
operate for the remainder
of December.

Please advise.

Tom

Thomas H. Peck, CFO
